personal.name: Owolabi Oluwashijibomi Jeremiah
personal.title: Computer Scientist
personal.bio: I build AI systems that work in production. My focus is the intersection of machine learning and cloud infrastructure, model serving, inference pipelines, and the engineering decisions that make intelligent systems reliable at scale.

about.headline: Engineering the Future, One System at a Time
paragraphs: I'm a Computer Science student at Lead City University with a deep passion for building systems that scale. My work spans AI and machine learning, cloud engineering, and full-stack web development.
I believe great software is not just functional — it's thoughtful, resilient, and built for the future. I design systems with first-principles thinking, always asking: what happens at 10x scale?
When I'm not coding, I'm researching ML infrastructure patterns, exploring cloud-native architectures, or shipping products that solve real problems.

projects.title: LECTURE-LINK
projects.subtitle: AI-Enhanced Departmental Learning Portal
projects.description: A full-stack AI-powered learning management system built for university departments. Features semantic search across all course materials, an intelligent AI chatbot for student queries, and a comprehensive analytics dashboard for educators.
projects.longDescription: LECTURE-LINK reimagines how universities manage and deliver educational content. Built with a microservices architecture, it provides personalized learning experiences powered by machine learning. The semantic search engine indexes lecture notes, past papers, and resources — returning contextually relevant results even for vague queries.

projects.title: PhishGuard
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Phishing Detection
projects.description: Analyzes URLs in real time and classifies them as safe or malicious using an ensemble of four machine learning models: Logistic Regression, Random Forest, MLP Neural Network, and SVM.
projects.longDescription: Four models. One verdict. No phishing gets through. PhishGuard extracts smart features from URLs, length, entropy, suspicious keywords, domain age signals, and more, runs them through trained classifiers, and returns an instant threat verdict with confidence scores. Built with a Flask + scikit-learn backend and a React/TypeScript frontend, deployed on Render with an LRU result cache for performance under constrained server environments.

projects.title: GPI Localized Site
projects.subtitle: Corporate Website · Graphics Packaging International
projects.description: A localized web presence built for GPI during my internship. Clean, performant, and branded to the company's identity.
projects.longDescription: Built and deployed a localized corporate website for Graphics Packaging International as part of my internship work. Focused on performance, accessibility, and accurate brand representation.

projects.title: Bereah
projects.subtitle: Landing Page · AI Bible Startup
projects.description: A modern, conversion-focused landing page for Bereah — an AI-powered Bible study startup. Designed to communicate vision, build trust, and drive signups.
projects.longDescription: Designed and built the marketing landing page for Bereah, an AI Bible startup. The page communicates the product's value proposition with clean typography, smooth animations, and a strong call to action.
